title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Failure Case: Instruction Data Separation
summary: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt instruction data separation increment in a prompt threat model and red-team suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
